assertions.rationale: Implements IClientStore (the read-only store interface), not IClientConfigurationStore. The add/update/delete methods are custom additions not from IClientConfigurationStore.

assertions.assertion: Includes an AddAsync method for persisting new clients
assertions.rationale: Includes AddClientAsync method for inserting clients into MongoDB, though the method signature differs from IClientConfigurationStore.AddAsync.

assertions.assertion: Includes a FindByClientIdAsync method that returns Client or null
assertions.rationale: Implements FindClientByIdAsync returning Client or null (via IClientStore), though the method name differs from IClientConfigurationStore.FindByClientIdAsync.

assertions.assertion: Includes UpdateAsync and DeleteAsync methods for client lifecycle management
assertions.rationale: Includes UpdateClientAsync and DeleteClientAsync methods for client management.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that client secrets should be stored securely (hashed, not plaintext)
assertions.rationale: States 'Make sure to hash client secrets before storing them in MongoDB'.
